metadata.scenario: A woman calls for the first time asking about in-home physical therapy for her elderly father. She asks about pricing and availability. The receptionist provides a quote for three visits per week. The caller sounds relieved and says she'll call back to confirm. First-time caller, prospect.

transcription.text: Thank you for calling CareFirst Home Health, this is Margaret speaking. How can I help you today? Hi, my name is Emily. I'm calling to inquire about in-home physical therapy for my father. Of course, Emily. I can assist with that. May I ask how old your father is? He’s 78 years old, and he recently had some mobility issues. I see. We have physical therapy services available. When is he looking to start? Ideally, as soon as possible. What are the prices and availability? For in-home physical therapy, our rates range from $110 to $140 per session, depending on the specific needs. Okay, and how many sessions do you recommend per week? Typically, we recommend three sessions a week for optimal recovery. That sounds good. So, what would the total cost be for three visits a week? If we take an average of $125 per session, that would be about $375 per week for three sessions. Alright, that’s manageable. What about scheduling? We have availability Monday through Friday, and generally, we can accommodate morning and early afternoon slots. Perfect! That works for us. Can I get back to you later for confirmation? Absolutely, take your time. Just call our number back when you’re ready. Will do. Also, do you offer any other services that might be helpful? Yes, we also provide skilled nursing care, which can be beneficial for medication management and overall health monitoring. That sounds useful! I’ll keep that in mind when I call back. Great! Just to note, our skilled nursing care ranges from $95 to $125 per visit. Thanks for that information. I appreciate your help, Margaret. You’re very welcome, Emily! I look forward to hearing from you again soon. Thanks, have a great day! You too! Goodbye!
